Semantic Aliases
Token Value Description pagePadding 24px Page outer padding cardGap 16px Gap between cards cardPadding 24px Card inner padding cardPaddingCompact 16px KPI card padding appBarHeight 50px Global app bar height sidebarWidth 254px Navigation sidebar width contentLeftOffset 278px Sidebar + 24px gap contentMax 1200px Content column max-width

Border Radius

none0px
sm4px
md6pxtooltip
lg8pxnav card
xl12pxALL cards ← universal
full200pxpills, chips
circle50%avatars
Rule: All cards, callout boxes, insight panels → xl (12px) without exception. Filter pills and chips → full (200px). Avatars and icon circles → circle (50%).

Shadows — Elevation Effect Styles

none

No shadow

none

outlined

Elevation/Outlined — card borders

0 0 0 1px rgba(229,232,237,1)

card

Elevation — standard card

0 0 16px rgba(23,42,68,0.2)

modal

Elevation/Modals

0 0 16px rgba(26,32,54,0.2)

heroCard

Hero Card Elevation

0 4px 14px rgba(9,58,107,0.2)
Rule: Standard cards → none. Modal overlays → modal. Hero KPI cards → none. Background blur uses backdrop-filter: blur(10px) — not a box-shadow.

Breakpoints

sm640px
md768px
lg1024px
xl1280px
2xl1536px

Icons

All icons come from the Icon/ namespace in the design system. Three weights are available for most icons: Filled, Outline, and Light. All icons are rendered at 20 × 20 px unless otherwise noted.

20 × 20 px Filled · Outline · Light Figma node 31595:15275
Navigation Icons
20 × 20 px NavIcon/ namespace Figma node 58-4494
Brand Activator
Smart Monitor
Data Mgmt
Competitors
Search Terms
Adverts
Brand Protect
Lab
My Analytics
Support
Bell
AI Search

Usage on dark backgrounds

On the App Bar (#063059), icons appear white — no colour changes needed; use any icon as-is on the dark surface.

Logos

Brand and partner logos used across the Adthena product. AI platform logos are available in two formats: 16px inline (for use inside UI elements) and 32px Round (circular badge).

Figma node 26:1243 16px · 32px Round
Adthena
121 × 26px · White · On dark
On fill/main (#1565c0)
125 × 36px · Dark · On white
125 × 36px · #063059 · On white
Favicon · ICO
27 × 27px · White · On dark
27 × 27px · Dark · On light
AI Platform Logos
Platform 16px — Inline 32px — Round
ChatGPT
16 × 16
32 × 32 · r16
Perplexity
16 × 16
32 × 32 · r16
Google
16 × 16
32 × 32 · r16
Usage guidelines
FormatSizeUse when
Inline16 × 16 pxInside Sub Tab items, table cells, compact labels — sits inline with 12–14px text
Round badge32 × 32 px · r16Avatar-style slots, profile rows, pill containers
Arlo mascot27 × 24 pxApp Bar Arlo section, notification panel footer, empty states
KPI Card Card Header Widget Header Dashboard Widget Dashboard Banner Accordion

Timeline Chart Dotted Timeline Chart Stacked Lines Chart Multi-Chart Lines Single Timeline

Design Tokens
fill/dark
#063059 — bar background
primary/bright
#5bb3f9 — location pin & logo
primary/medium
#3079bd — panel action text
primary/bright (active tab)

Props Reference
PropTypeDefaultDescription
domainstring"Domain / Location"Label in the domain selector button.
notificationCountnumber0Badge count on bell. 0 hides the badge entirely.
onNotificationsOpen() => void—Callback fired when bell is clicked.
onMenuToggle() => void—Callback fired when hamburger is clicked.
arloLabelstring"Ask Arlo"Label beside the Arlo mascot.
classNamestring—Optional extra class for layout overrides.

ElementSizeWeightColor
Domain / Location13pxSemiBold 600#ffffff
Ask Arlo label14pxSemiBold 600#ffffff
Panel tab labels13pxSemiBold 600#858585 / #fff active
Insight card title16pxSemiBold 600#454545
Insight card body14pxRegular 400#181818
Action button14pxSemiBold 600#3079bd
Tab counter badge10pxSemiBold 600#6477a2

Design Tokens
TokenValueUsage
white#ffffffDefault background
core/primary/light#e8f2fcHover background
core/states/selected-bright#64abfbActive background
text/secondary#858585Default text
core/primary/medium#3079bdHover text
core/states/disabled#bacfe2Disabled text
neutral/neutral-25#eaeff5Counter badge background (default)
neutral/neutral-400#6477a2Counter badge text
borderRadius.full200pxPill shape
—30pxFixed height
—0 16pxHorizontal padding
—14px · SemiBold · capitalizeLabel typography
—11px · SemiBoldCounter typography (default)
—10px · SemiBoldCounter typography (active)
—16 × 16pxIcon size
Props
PropTypeDefaultDescription
labelstring—Tab label text, rendered in capitalize
activebooleanfalseSelected state — bright blue fill, white text, white counter bg
disabledbooleanfalseDisabled state — greyed text, no interactions
iconReactNode / SVG—Optional 16×16 icon prepended to the label; colour must match state
counternumber—Optional count badge appended after label; bg flips to white when active
onClick() => void—Click handler; no-op when disabled
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.tab-itemBase pill — default state, white bg, grey text
.tab-item--activeSelected state — bright blue bg, white text
.tab-item--disabledDisabled state — greyed text, pointer-events none
.tab-item__icon16×16 icon wrapper — flex centred, flex-shrink 0
.tab-item__counterCount badge — pill shape, auto bg flip on active parent

Design Tokens Used
blue/400
#3589e9 — value text
blue/100
#b1d1f6 — left bar
green/400
#40af46 — up delta
red/400
#de5a5a — down delta
neutral/400
#6477a2 — flat delta
neutral/600
#485982 — label
neutral/800
#27365b — subtitle
white/white
#ffffff — card bg
radius: xl
12px — card corners
shadow: none
KPI card elevation
Props Reference
Prop Type Default Description
property1 "up" | "down" | "flat" | "label only" "up" Controls the trend direction, sparkline colour, delta sign, and layout.
label string "Keywords Submitted" Uppercase metric label in the card header.
value string | number 31 Primary numeric or text value. Uses 44 px Light for numbers, 22 px Regular for "label only".
delta string "+3" / "-3" / "-" / "+3%" Change indicator. Colour is driven by property1: green (up), red (down), neutral-400 (flat/label).
subtitle string "Subtitle" Secondary descriptor below the metric row. 12 px Light, neutral-800.
showInfo boolean true Shows the ⓘ icon in the header. Attach a tooltip or popover to it.
className string — Optional override class for width / layout overrides in a grid.
Typography Specs
ElementSizeWeightLine HeightColor
Header label12pxSemiBold 60014px#485982 (neutral/600)
Value (numeric)44pxLight 30044px#3589e9 (blue/400)
Value (label only)22pxRegular 40024px#3589e9 (blue/400)
Delta16pxRegular 40014pxVariant-driven
Subtitle12pxRegular 40012px#27365b (neutral/800)

Specifications
PropertyValue
Width227px (default)
Body padding24px
Border-radius12px (radius.xl)
Background#ffffff
Shadowdrop-shadow(0 0 16px rgba(23,42,68,0.2))
Font13px · Regular 400 · Open Sans
Line-height15px
Text colour#212121
Arrow size78 × 10px (centred within body width)
Figma node28:435 (Claude-DS)
Props
PropTypeDefaultNotes
textstring—Tooltip body content
placement"top" | "bottom""top"Arrow direction (bottom = above trigger, top = below)
maxWidthnumber227Body max-width in px
visiblebooleanfalseControlled visibility
classNamestring—Layout override

Service Bar

Page-level header card combining three stacked rows: identity (icon + title + date picker), tab navigation (pill rail with Tab Items), and optional filter bar (dropdown filters). Present at the top of every feature screen.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live Demo · Full 3-row layout
AI Overview How AI Overviews impact search visibility and query complexity across key terms to prioritize content and PPC strategy.
Last 30 Days
Start Day —
End Day —
Shows how AI Overviews affect search visibility and query complexity. Use this to prioritize content updates and PPC strategy across your tracked terms.
Summary
Impact
Content
Signals
All Devices
Desktop
Mobile

Text tabs
Summary
Impact
Content
Signals
With counter badges
All 24
New 8

Row 3 · Filter bar
All Devices
Desktop
Mobile
Design Tokens
TokenValueUsage
white#ffffffCard background
borderRadius.xl12pxCard corner radius
—16pxCard inner padding
—16pxGap between rows
core/states/selected-bright#64abfbDefault avatar background (AI/ChatGPT features)
—40×40pxAvatar circle size
—16pxTitle font size
—#000000Title colour
—12pxSubtitle font size
grey/grey-800#424242Subtitle colour
core/secondary/card-grey#fafafaDate picker bg · Tab rail bg · Filter bar bg
other/dividerrgba(0,0,0,0.12)Date picker border
borderRadius.lg8pxDate picker corner radius
—200px wide, 40px tallDate picker dimensions
—42pxTab rail height
—40px border-radiusTab rail pill shape
—6px 12px 6px 6pxTab rail padding
core/primary/medium#2f78bdFilter button label colour
borderRadius.xl12pxFilter bar corner radius
—8pxFilter bar inner padding
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.service-barRoot card — white, rounded-xl, 16px padding, flex column
.service-bar__headerRow 1 — flex row, 8px gap, align-center
.service-bar__avatar40px circle icon container — default bg #64abfb
.service-bar__textTitle + subtitle column, flex-1
.service-bar__title16px semibold black title
.service-bar__subtitle12px regular #424242, truncated single line
.service-bar__actionsRight-aligned action group (date + info)
.service-bar__date200×40px date picker — #fafafa bg, border, rounded-lg
.service-bar__date-labelDate label text inside picker
.service-bar__info-btn36px icon button — transparent, hover #eaeff5
.service-bar__tabsRow 2 tab rail — #fafafa bg, 42px height, pill (40px radius)
.service-bar__filtersRow 3 filter bar — #fafafa bg, rounded-xl, 8px padding
.service-bar__filter-rowFlex row of filter buttons + spacer
.service-bar__filter-btnFilter dropdown button — 30px, #2f78bd text, hover #e8f2fc
.service-bar__filter-spacerflex:1 — pushes right-aligned filters to the end
HTML Usage
ElementNotes
Avatar bg colourOverride via style="background:#your-color" on .service-bar__avatar — use #64abfb for AI/ChatGPT, #052f59 for core nav features
Date label format"19 Aug 2025 – 28 Aug 2025" or "Last 30 Days"
Tab itemsUse .tab-item and .tab-item--active inside .service-bar__tabs
Tab counterAdd .tab-item__counter inside .tab-item (reuses Tab Item component)
Filter alignmentPlace .service-bar__filter-spacer between left and right filter groups to push right filters to end
Omitting rowsRow 2 (tabs) or Row 3 (filters) can be omitted for simpler pages — Row 1 is always required
Subtitle truncationSubtitle always stays on one line — overflow hidden with ellipsis

Date Picker

Compact date range selector used in the Service Bar identity row. Shows the currently selected period as a text label with a calendar icon on the right. Sizes to its content — no fixed width.

Live Demo · Interactive Picker
Last 30 Days
Start Day —
End Day —
Trigger States
Last 30 Days
Default
Last 30 Days
Hover
19 Aug – 18 Sep 2025
Date Range
Design Tokens
TokenValueUsage
core/secondary/card-grey#fafafaDefault background
primary.light#EAF1F7Hover background
borderRadius.lg8pxCorner radius
—40pxHeight
—0 8pxHorizontal padding
—8pxGap between label and icon
text.primaryVar#181818Label text colour
—13px / 400Label font size / weight
core/primary/medium#2f78bdCalendar icon stroke
—14×15pxCalendar icon size
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.service-bar__dateContainer — flex row, 40px height, #fafafa bg, 8px radius, sizes to content
.service-bar__date-labelText label — 13px regular #181818, flex:none
.service-bar__date-label span.yearYear portion of a date range — 10px, visually de-emphasised
HTML Usage
<div class="service-bar__date">
  <span class="service-bar__date-label">Last 30 Days</span>
  <svg width="14" height="15" viewBox="0 0 14 15" fill="none" style="flex-shrink:0">
    <rect x="0.5" y="1.5" width="13" height="13" rx="2" stroke="#2f78bd"/>
    <path d="M0.5 5.5h13" stroke="#2f78bd"/>
    <path d="M4 0.5v2M10 0.5v2" stroke="#2f78bd" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </svg>
</div>

<!-- Date range variant -->
<div class="service-bar__date">
  <span class="service-bar__date-label">
    19 Aug – 18 Sep <span class="year">2025</span>
  </span>
  <svg ...>...</svg>
</div>

Button

Multi-variant action button. Covers primary CTAs, secondary actions, plain text links, outlined borders, icon-only controls, and semantic accent colours (red/green). All sizes share a 6px border radius and 14px semibold label.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Types · Regular (40px)
Primary
Secondary
Plain
Outlined
Plain Dark
Red
Green
Types · Small (30px)
Primary
Secondary
Plain
Outlined
States (Plain type shown)
Default
Hover
Pressed
Disabled
Icon-only variants
Icon (plain)
Icon-Primary
Icon-Secondary
Icon-Outlined
Disabled
Plain White · On dark surface
Design Tokens
TokenValueUsage
core/primary/main#0c8deaPrimary bg · Icon-Primary bg
core/primary/bright#5bb3f9Primary pressed · Plain pressed bg
core/primary/medium#3079bdSecondary/Plain/Outlined text
core/primary/semi-light-blue#dbe9f6Secondary bg · Icon-Secondary bg · border stroke
core/primary/light / core/states/hover#e8f2fcHover bg (Plain, Secondary, Outlined)
core/states/selected#d6e8ffSecondary/Outlined pressed bg
core/states/disabled#bacfe2Disabled text colour
neutral/neutral-600#485982Plain Dark text
—#ea5160Red bg
—#49b170Green bg
borderRadius.md6pxAll button shapes
—40pxRegular height
—30pxSmall height (btn--sm)
—36pxAccent height — Red/Green (btn--accent)
—0 12pxHorizontal padding
—14px · SemiBold · 20px line-heightLabel typography
—16 × 16pxIcon size
—4pxGap between icon and label
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.btnBase element — always required
.btn--primaryFilled blue — primary CTA
.btn--secondaryLight blue fill — secondary action
.btn--plainTransparent — inline text action
.btn--outlinedWhite fill + blue stroke border
.btn--plain-darkTransparent — muted navy text, light surfaces
.btn--plain-whiteTransparent — white text, on dark surfaces
.btn--redRed fill — destructive/critical action
.btn--greenGreen fill — confirmatory/positive action
.btn--smSmall size modifier — 30px height
.btn--accentAccent size modifier — 36px height (Red/Green)
.btn--icon-onlySquare icon-only — transparent
.btn--icon-primarySquare icon-only — primary fill
.btn--icon-secondarySquare icon-only — secondary fill
.btn--icon-outlinedSquare icon-only — outlined
.btn--disabledDisabled state (also use disabled attr)
.btn__icon16 × 16 icon wrapper (child element)
HTML Usage
ExampleCode
Primary<button class="btn btn--primary">Save</button>
Primary + icon<button class="btn btn--primary"><span class="btn__icon">…svg…</span> Save</button>
Secondary small<button class="btn btn--secondary btn--sm">Cancel</button>
Plain<button class="btn btn--plain">View all</button>
Outlined<button class="btn btn--outlined">Export</button>
Red accent<button class="btn btn--red btn--accent">Delete</button>
Green accent<button class="btn btn--green btn--accent">Confirm</button>
Icon-only primary<button class="btn btn--icon-primary"><span class="btn__icon">…svg…</span></button>
Disabled<button class="btn btn--primary btn--disabled" disabled>Save</button>
Plain white (dark)<button class="btn btn--plain-white">Learn more</button>

Card Header

Standard top section of every content card. Combines a title + subtitle column on the left with optional right-side action controls: SubTab Rail, Toggle Switch, Chart Mode Selector, and icon-only action buttons.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live Demo · Full layout
Competitive Share
Brand visibility across all monitored categories
Active Threats Only 8 All Advertisers 28
Chart mode
Card content area
Variants
Title only
Section Title
Title + Subtitle
Growing Fastest
Industries with the highest week-over-week impression share growth
Two-line subtitle · icons top-aligned
Overall AIO Answer Themes
Breakdown of AI Overview answers by content style across all queries
Title + Subtitle + SubTabs
Ad Frequency
Percentage share of observed ad placements by advertiser
Top 10 10 All 47
Sub-components
SubTab Rail
Default
Active Threats Only 8 All Advertisers 28
Second active
Active Threats Only 8 All Advertisers 28
Toggle Switch
Off
On
Chart Mode
Donut
Chart mode
Line
Chart mode
Action Buttons
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.card-headerRoot element — white bg, rounded top (12px), 96px min-height, 24px padding
.card-header--standaloneModifier — 12px all corners when used without a card body below
.card-header__roundel32×32px circle (#93a1b6) left of title — flex-shrinks to 0, centers a 20×20px white icon
.card-header__title-sectionLeft flex-1 column holding title row + subtitle
.card-header__title-rowFlex row for title text + optional badge/pill
.card-header__title16px semibold rgba(0,0,0,0.87) — card section name
.card-header__subtitle13px regular #6b6b6b — context description, up to 2 lines, line-height 14px (tight wrap)
.card-header__actionsRight-side flex row, gap 8px, left padding 12px — align-items:flex-start keeps icons pinned to the top when subtitle wraps
.card-header__action-btn30×30px transparent icon button — hover: #eaeff5
.subtab-rail#fafafa pill wrapper (border-radius 40px, p-6px) for .subtab items
.toggle-switchFlex label wrapping hidden input + track + label text
.toggle-switch__inputHidden checkbox (absolute, opacity 0) — drives CSS-only state
.toggle-switch__track35×20px pill track — off: #d0d5e8 / on: #5bb3f9
.toggle-switch__thumb16×16px white thumb — left 2px (off) → left 17px (on)
.toggle-switch__label14px regular #496f97 label text
.chart-modeFlex row: label + two icon mode buttons
.chart-mode__label"Chart mode" 12px regular #496f97
.chart-mode__btn30×30px transparent icon button — hover: #eaeff5
.chart-mode__btn--activeActive state — #5bb3f9 bg, white icon
Design Tokens
TokenValueUsage
white#ffffffCard header background
borderRadius.xl12pxCard header corner radius
text/primaryrgba(0,0,0,0.87)Title text colour
text/secondary#6b6b6bSubtitle text colour
core/secondary/card-grey#fafafaSubTab rail background
neutral/neutral-300#7387a9SubTab active background
neutral/neutral-400#6477a2SubTab inactive text · badge text
neutral/neutral-25#eaeff5SubTab badge bg · action btn hover bg
neutral#496f97Toggle label · Chart mode label
neutral/neutral-600#485982Action button icon colour
core/primary/bright#5bb3f9Toggle on · Chart mode active bg
—#d0d5e8Toggle off track
borderRadius.md6pxChart btn radius · Action btn radius
—30 × 30pxChart mode btn · action btn size
—35 × 20pxToggle track size
—24pxCard header padding
—96pxCard header minimum height

Widget Header

The top section of every content card. Combines a coloured roundel icon, title, and optional subtitle on the left with icon-only action buttons on the right. Built from Figma node 169:2345 via the Figma MCP workflow.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live Preview
Competitive Share Brand visibility across all monitored categories

Title goes here A descriptive body text comes here
Title only + info

Download + info

No actions
Intent Topics Search intent breakdown by category
Interactive Demo
Competitive Share Brand visibility across all monitored categories
Design Tokens
Token Value Usage
Component height96pxFixed total height (padding 24px top + bottom)
Padding24pxAll sides
Gap (row)8pxBetween thumb, body, and actions
Roundel size32 × 32pxIcon circle — full pill radius
neutral/neutral-100#93a1b6Roundel background (default)
Icon size20 × 20pxThumb icon — always white
Title — size16px / 600 / 17px lhtext/primary rgba(0,0,0,0.87)
Title — gap to subtitle2pxFlex column gap
Subtitle — size13px / 400 / 14px lhtext/secondary #6b6b6b
Action button size30 × 30pxTransparent background, 6px radius
Action button gap8pxBetween action buttons
Action icon size16 × 16pxInside action button
Action icon — default#6b6b6btext/secondary
Action icon — hover#27365btext/body + rgba(0,0,0,0.06) bg
CSS Classes
Class Description
.whRoot flex row — white background, 24px padding, 12px radius
.wh__thumb32×32px circle — #93a1b6 background, centres the icon
.wh__bodyFlex-1 column — holds .wh__title and optional .wh__subtitle
.wh__title16px semibold, rgba(0,0,0,0.87), single line with overflow ellipsis
.wh__subtitle13px regular, #6b6b6b — optional; omit element to show title only
.wh__actionsRight-side flex group — 8px gap, 12px left padding
.wh__btn30×30px icon button — transparent bg, hover adds rgba(0,0,0,0.06)
Anatomy
Title goes here A descriptive body text comes here
A · Thumb
32×32px circle
#93a1b6 bg
20×20px icon
B · Title
16px / 600
rgba(0,0,0,.87)
lh 17px
C · Subtitle
13px / 400
#6b6b6b
lh 14px · optional
D · Actions
30×30px buttons
16×16px icons
8px gap

Anatomy
Widget Title A descriptive subtitle text here
A
Widget Header
.wh — roundel + title + actions
padding-bottom: 20px
B
Stacked Lines Chart
.stacked-timeline — SVG chart
+ legend below

Card shell
bg #fff · radius 12px
padding 24px
HTML Structure
<!-- Dashboard Widget card -->
<div class="dw-card">

  <!-- A: Widget Header -->
  <div class="wh">
    <div class="wh__thumb">…</div>
    <div class="wh__body">…</div>
    <div class="wh__actions">…</div>
  </div>

  <!-- B: Stacked Timeline -->
  <div class="stacked-timeline">
    <svg class="stacked-timeline__svg" viewBox="0 0 740 215">…</svg>
    <div class="stacked-timeline__legend">…</div>
  </div>

</div>
Design Tokens
TokenValueUsage
Card bg#ffffffOuter card background
Card radius12pxOuter card border-radius
Card padding24pxAll sides of the white card
Header bottom gap20pxSpace between .wh and chart
Roundel bg#93a1b6.wh__thumb background
Title16px / 600 / rgba(0,0,0,0.87).wh__title
Subtitle13px / 400 / #6b6b6b.wh__subtitle
Above AIO#8ac8b1Stacked band — top
Inside AIO#b3a2e7Stacked band — mid
Below AIO#e86492Stacked band — bottom
No Ads#E4E8F2Stacked band — top cap
Grid lines#dce3efHorizontal axis lines
Legend text#38476a / 13px / 300.stacked-timeline__legend-item
Legend gap12px top / 20px between items.stacked-timeline__legend
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.whWidget Header root — flex row, padding-bottom 20px when used inside .dw-card
.wh__thumb32×32px roundel — #93a1b6 background, white icon
.wh__bodyFlex column — title + subtitle
.wh__title16px semibold heading, truncates with ellipsis
.wh__subtitle13px regular secondary text — omit element if not needed
.wh__actionsRight-side icon button group
.stacked-timelineChart root — display:block; width:100%
.stacked-timeline__svgSVG element — width:100%; scales via viewBox
.stacked-timeline__legendCentred flex row of legend items, margin-top:12px
.stacked-timeline__legend-itemColour dot + label — 13px, #38476a

TokenValueUsage
Container bg (default)#ffffff.db background
Container bg (hover)#eaf4ff.db:hover background
Container radius12px.db border-radius
Container height96px.db height
Container padding0 24px.db padding
Hover shadownoneNo elevation on hover
Color bar width20px.db__bar
Color bar bg#b1d1f6.db__bar background (blue/100)
Color bar radius200px.db__bar (fully rounded pill)
Color bar icon size20 × 20pxDashboard icon inside .db__bar
Color bar icon colour#ffffff.db__bar color (stroke via currentColor)
Inner gap8px.db__inner gap
Body gap6px.db__body gap (between title and subtitle)
Title size16px.db__title
Title weight600.db__title
Title colourrgba(0,0,0,0.87).db__title
Title line-height22px.db__title — allows descenders (g, y, p, q)
Subtitle size13px.db__subtitle
Subtitle colour#6b6b6b.db__subtitle
Subtitle line-height20px.db__subtitle — multi-line wraps naturally
Chip bg#e7ecf4.db__chip background
Chip height20px.db__chip
Chip radius16px.db__chip
Chip text size12px.db__chip
Chip text colour#576993.db__chip (neutral/500)
Actions gap8px.db__actions gap
Actions left padding12px.db__actions padding-left
Kebab size30 × 30px.db__kebab
Kebab radius6px.db__kebab
Kebab icon colour#6b6b6b.db__kebab default
Kebab hover bgrgba(0,0,0,0.06).db__kebab:hover
Arrow ring size32 × 32px.db__arrow-ring
Arrow ring bg#d1e4fa.db__arrow-ring (outer ring)
Arrow ring padding2px.db__arrow-ring inner gap
Arrow inner bg#a1b6d8.db__arrow (default)
Arrow hover bg#27365b.db__arrow-ring:hover .db__arrow
Arrow icon colour#ffffff.db__arrow SVG
CSS Classes
ClassElementNotes
.dbRoot containerFull-width flex row, 96px height, 24px h-padding, radius 12px. Hover: bg #eaf4ff + elevation shadow
.db__innerInner flex rowFull width, gap 8px, items-center
.db__barColour pill with icon20px wide, full height, pill-shaped (#b1d1f6), dashboard icon (white) centered
.db__bodyTitle + subtitle columnflex:1, min-width:0 to allow truncation
.db__titleDashboard name16px semibold, truncates with ellipsis
.db__subtitleDescription text13px regular, truncates with ellipsis
.db__chipStatus chip20px pill, bg #e7ecf4, 12px semibold #576993
.db__actionsRight-side button rowgap 8px, padding-left 12px
.db__kebabThree-dot menu button30×30px, radius 6px, hover bg rgba(0,0,0,0.06)
.db__arrow-ringOuter ring wrapper32×32, bg #d1e4fa, 2px padding
.db__arrowArrow button inner circlebg #27365b, white arrow SVG, hover darkens
HTML Structure
<div class="db">
  <div class="db__inner">
    <div class="db__bar">
      <svg width="20" height="20"><!-- dashboard icon --></svg>
    </div>
    <div class="db__body">
      <div class="db__title">Dashboard title</div>
      <div class="db__subtitle">A descriptive body text comes here</div>
    </div>
    <div class="db__actions">
      <span class="db__chip">Shared</span>
      <button class="db__kebab" title="More options"><!-- kebab icon --></button>
      <div class="db__arrow-ring">
        <div class="db__arrow"><!-- arrow icon --></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Hover state is CSS-only (.db:hover) — no modifier class needed -->
Duplicate
Share
Delete
Delete dashboard?
will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
Share dashboard
Share with your team.
Access level
View only
Can edit
No access

Accordion

Collapsible row with drag-to-reorder handle, toggle switch, title/description, item count, and expand button. Designed for configuration panels and ordered settings lists where items can be enabled or disabled and rearranged.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live Preview

Click a row or its expand button to open/close. Toggle the switch to enable or disable an item.

Google Ads
Search, Shopping & Display campaigns
4/4
Search Campaigns12 keywords
Shopping Campaigns3 campaigns
Display Campaigns2 campaigns
Performance Max1 campaign
Microsoft Advertising
Bing & Audience Network campaigns
3/3
Search Campaigns8 keywords
Audience Campaigns2 campaigns
Shopping Campaigns1 campaign
Meta Ads
Facebook & Instagram campaigns
0/2
Facebook Campaigns4 campaigns
Instagram Campaigns2 campaigns
LinkedIn Ads
B2B sponsored content & InMail
2/2
Sponsored Content5 campaigns
InMail Campaigns2 campaigns
Variants
Default — Collapsed
Google Ads
Search, Shopping & Display campaigns
4/4
Expanded
Google Ads
Search, Shopping & Display campaigns
4/4
Search Campaigns12 keywords
Shopping Campaigns3 campaigns
Display Campaigns2 campaigns
Toggle Off — Disabled
Meta Ads
Facebook & Instagram campaigns
0/2
Anatomy
① Drag handle Dot-grip SVG (20×20 px). Allows drag-to-reorder. Use onclick="event.stopPropagation()" to prevent the row toggle from firing during drag. ② Toggle switch 35×20 px CSS toggle. Enables/disables the item. When unchecked, call accSetDisabled(id, true) to add .is-disabled on the .acc-wrap. The toggle itself remains interactive. ③ Title / Description Primary label: 16 px, weight 600, rgba(0,0,0,0.87). Secondary text: 13 px, #6b6b6b. ④ Count badge Shows active/total ratio (e.g. 4/4, 2/3). Optional. 14 px, #6477a2. ⑤ Expand button 32×32 ring button. Outer ring: #d1e4fa. Inner circle: #eaeff5. Chevron rotates 180° when .acc-wrap.is-expanded. ⑥ Content panel Hidden by default (max-height: 0). Add .is-open on .acc__content and .is-expanded on .acc-wrap to reveal. Shares the same background and border as the header.
HTML Usage
<!-- Wrap row + content panel together -->
<div class="acc-wrap" id="acc-0">

  <div class="acc" onclick="accToggle('acc-0')">

    <!-- ① Drag handle -->
    <div class="acc__drag" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
      <!-- inline 6-dot drag SVG -->
    </div>

    <!-- ② Toggle switch (DS component) -->
    <label class="toggle-switch" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
      <input type="checkbox" class="toggle-switch__input" checked
             onchange="accSetDisabled('acc-0', !this.checked)">
      <span class="toggle-switch__track"><span class="toggle-switch__thumb"></span></span>
    </label>

    <!-- ③ Title / Description -->
    <div class="acc__body">
      <div class="acc__title">Google Ads</div>
      <div class="acc__desc">Search, Shopping &amp; Display campaigns</div>
    </div>

    <!-- ④ Count badge -->
    <span class="acc__count">4/4</span>

    <!-- ⑤ Expand button -->
    <button class="acc__btn"
            onclick="event.stopPropagation(); accToggle('acc-0')">
      <div class="acc__btn-inner">
        <!-- inline chevron SVG -->
      </div>
    </button>

  </div>

  <!-- ⑥ Content panel -->
  <div class="acc__content" id="acc-0-c">
    <!-- any content here -->
  </div>

</div>

<script>
function accToggle(id) {
  var wrap    = document.getElementById(id);
  var content = document.getElementById(id + '-c');
  var open    = wrap.classList.toggle('is-expanded');
  if (content) content.classList.toggle('is-open', open);
}
function accSetDisabled(id, disabled) {
  document.getElementById(id).classList.toggle('is-disabled', disabled);
}
</script>

Multi-Chart Lines

Stacked metric rows combining a left KPI highlight tile (label, large value, delta badge) with a right smooth sparkline chart. Used inside card content areas to display multiple related time-series metrics at a glance.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live Demo · 3 metrics
Mentions 744 +22%
8000
Citations 252 -16%
4000
Links 73 -5%
1000
800
21 Apr, 2026 28 Apr, 2026 5 May, 2026 12 May, 2026 19 May, 2026
KPI Colour Themes
Mentions 8,654 +3%
Purple #6848c6
Citations 1,654 -8%
Blue #3785dd
Links 454 -3%
Teal #36AEBA
Advertisers 247 +12%
Orange #e06500
Single Row · Anatomy
Label 8,654 +3%
8000
.mclc__kpi — 148×68px, rounded-xl, colour-themed .mclc__chart — flex-1, 93px, Y labels + canvas .mclc__canvas-wrap — relative, holds bands + SVG
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.mclcRoot — white bg, rounded-xl, pb-24px
.mclc__bodyInner column — flex col, gap 16px, px-24px, pt-16px
.mclc__rowSingle metric row — flex row, 93px height, gap 10px
.mclc__kpiLeft KPI tile — 148×68px, rounded-xl, px-24px. Set color inline to theme the tile.
.mclc__kpi-innerCentred flex column — gap 0
.mclc__kpi-labelSeries name — 12px regular, inherits colour
.mclc__kpi-valueCurrent total — 40px light (300), letter-spacing -2px
.mclc__kpi-deltaChange badge — 11px, letter-spacing -0.22px
.mclc__kpi-delta--upPositive delta — green #40af46
.mclc__kpi-delta--downNegative delta — red #de5a5a
.mclc__chartRight chart area — flex-1, 93px height, gap 8px
.mclc__y-labelsY-axis column — Condensed 13px #858585, justify-between, pb-16px
.mclc__canvas-wrapRelative container — holds bands + SVG, flex-1
.mclc__bandsGhost band wrapper — absolute inset-0, flex, 10% opacity
.mclc__bandSingle ghost column — 32px wide, #d9d9d9
.mclc__svgChart SVG — absolute, top-20px, viewBox 0 0 100 100, preserveAspectRatio none
Design Tokens
TokenValueUsage
white#ffffffComponent background
borderRadius.xl12pxRoot + KPI tile radius
—93pxRow height
—148 × 68pxKPI tile size
—40px / 300KPI value — font-size / font-weight (light)
—-2pxKPI value letter-spacing
—12pxKPI label font-size
—11px / -0.22pxDelta badge font-size / letter-spacing
green/400#40af46Positive delta colour
red/400#de5a5aNegative delta colour
purple#6848c6Series colour — Mentions / AI topics
blue#3785ddSeries colour — Citations
teal#36AEBASeries colour — Links
text/secondary#858585Y-axis label colour
—#d9d9d9 @ 10%Ghost band fill
—32pxGhost band width
—40pxGhost band h-padding
—20pxSVG top offset (clears Y max label)
—16pxBody padding-top · Row gap
—24pxBody padding-horizontal · Component pb
—10pxGap between KPI tile and chart

Single Timeline

A full-width sparkline chart with Y-axis labels and a date axis. Use when a card needs to show one time-series trend without a KPI summary tile.

Live Demo
8000
800
21 Apr, 2026 28 Apr, 2026 5 May, 2026 12 May, 2026 19 May, 2026
Anatomy
8000
.mclc__chart — flex-1, 93px, Y labels + canvas .mclc__x-axis — date tick row below the chart
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.mclcRoot wrapper — white bg, rounded-xl, pb-24px. Shared with Multi-Chart Lines.
.mclc__bodyInner column — flex col, gap 16px, px-24px, pt-16px
.mclc__rowChart row — flex row, 93px height
.mclc__chartFull-width chart area — flex-1, 93px height, gap 8px
.mclc__y-labelsY-axis column — Condensed 13px #858585, justify-between
.mclc__canvas-wrapRelative container — holds ghost bands + SVG line
.mclc__x-axisDate label row below the chart
.mclc__x-chartDate tick container — full width, aligns to chart area
.mclc__x-labelDate tick label — 10px #858585
Design Tokens
TokenValueUsage
white#ffffffComponent background
borderRadius.xl12pxContainer border-radius
—93pxChart row height
—Open Sans Condensed (wdth 75)Y-axis & X-axis label font
—13px / 400Y-axis label font-size / weight
—11px / 400X-axis label font-size / weight
text/secondary#858585Axis label colour
—20pxSVG top offset (clears Y max label)
—8pxGap between Y labels and canvas
—#d9d9d9 @ 10%Ghost band fill
—32pxGhost band width
—40pxGhost band horizontal padding
purple/600#6848c6Default series stroke colour
—16pxBody padding-top
—24pxBody padding-horizontal · Component padding-bottom
—4pxGap between chart row and x-axis
HTML Usage
<div class="mclc">
  <div class="mclc__body">

    <div class="mclc__row">
      <div class="mclc__chart">
        <div class="mclc__y-labels"><span>800</span><span>0</span></div>
        <div class="mclc__canvas-wrap">
          <div class="mclc__bands">
            <div class="mclc__band"></div><div class="mclc__band"></div>
            <div class="mclc__band"></div><div class="mclc__band"></div>
          </div>
          <svg class="mclc__svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100" preserveAspectRatio="none"
               data-color="#6848c6" data-ymin="0" data-ymax="800"
               data-start="2026-04-21"
               data-vals="0.12,0.27,0.44,0.57,0.68,0.76,0.82,0.88,0.90,0.93"></svg>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="mclc__x-axis">
      <div class="mclc__x-chart">
        <span class="mclc__x-y-spacer">800</span>
        <div class="mclc__x-labels">
          <span class="mclc__x-label">21 Apr, 2026</span>
          <span class="mclc__x-label">28 Apr, 2026</span>
          <span class="mclc__x-label">5 May, 2026</span>
          <span class="mclc__x-label">12 May, 2026</span>
          <span class="mclc__x-label">19 May, 2026</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

Segmented Bars Chart

Stacked proportional bar rows used to compare category distributions across two entities (e.g. You vs. Competitors Avg.). Each row shows a label, a pill-capped bar strip with coloured segments and inline percentages, and a shared legend. Hover reveals a breakdown tooltip with a "View Samples" action.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live Demo · hover a row
AXA Health
8%
34%
3%
40%
15%
Competitors Avg.

Segment Colours
Teal #79cbd2 Recommendations
Blue #559cec Comparative
Crimson #e86492 Cautionary
Magenta #d47dd4 Commercial
Purple #b3a2e7 Informational
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.ibcRoot container — flex col, gap 16px, full width
.ibc__rowsWrapper for multiple .ibc__row elements — flex col, gap 12px. Use inside .ibc to group rows before the legend.
.ibc__rowSingle entity row — flex col, 8px padding, 4px radius, hover bg #f5f8ff. Must be position:relative (set by default). Use padding:0 override when inside a container that already provides spacing.
.ibc__labelRow label row — flex, gap 4px, aligned center
.ibc__label-iconOptional 14×14px favicon left of label text — use a Google favicon <img> for brand rows; set border-radius:2px; overflow:hidden on the span
.ibc__label-textOpen Sans Condensed 13px #424242, truncated
.ibc__barsBar strip — flex row, 28px height, pill-left/square-right, overflow hidden
.ibc__barSingle segment — set flex: [pct] inline + background colour. Last child gets right pill radius.
.ibc__legendLegend row — flex wrap, gap 16px, horizontally centered
.ibc__legend-itemDot + label pair — flex, gap 4px
.ibc__legend-dot9px circle — set background colour inline
.ibc__legend-labelOpen Sans Condensed 13px #181818
.ibc__tooltipHover tooltip — absolute, bottom: 100%+6px. Positioned via JS left. Hidden by default, shown by .ibc__row:hover.
.ibc__tooltip-titleTooltip header — 12px Condensed, white, letter-spacing 0.5px
.ibc__tooltip-rowDot + value line inside tooltip
.ibc__tooltip-dot9px coloured dot inside tooltip
.ibc__tooltip-val13px Condensed white value text
.ibc__tooltip-divider1px white/20% horizontal rule
.ibc__tooltip-btn"View Samples" ghost button — 14px semibold #ededed, 30px height
.ibc__tooltip-arrowDownward pointing arrow caret below tooltip box
Design Tokens
TokenValueUsage
teal/teal-200#79cbd2Recommendations segment
blue/300#559cecComparative segment
crimson/300#e86492Cautionary segment
magenta/300#d47dd4Commercial segment
purple/200#b3a2e7Informational segment
grey/grey-800#424242Label text colour
text/primary#181818Legend label colour
—#f5f8ffRow hover background
—rgba(0,0,0,0.8)Tooltip background
—28pxBar strip height
—2pxGap between bar segments
—200px radiusBar strip left + right pill ends
—8pxRow padding
—9pxLegend dot diameter
—16pxRow gap · Legend item gap
—13px / CondensedAll label + legend + bar text
borderRadius.sm4pxRow border-radius · Tooltip radius

Gradient Bar Chart

Horizontal bar rows with gradient fills used to compare distributions or rankings across categories. Each row has a right-aligned label, a pill-shaped gradient bar, and an inside or outside percentage label depending on bar width. Hovering a row shows a contextual dark tooltip.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live Demo · hover a row
Favourable
60%
Users gathering information or researching topics
Neutral
35%
Users looking for specific websites or pages
Unfavourable
5%
Users seeking local businesses or services
Extended · 6 rows
Recommendations
72%
Query prompts asking the LLM to suggest options
Comparative
54%
Queries comparing two or more products or services
Informational
38%
Queries seeking facts, definitions or explanations
Commercial
22%
Queries with clear purchase or conversion intent
Cautionary
10%
Queries flagged for negative or risky sentiment
Navigational
3%
Queries directed at a specific brand or URL
Label Placement
Inside label — bar ≥ ~15%
Category
60%
Outside label — bar < ~10%
Category
4%
Centering in narrow cards

When a GBC is used inside a narrow card (e.g. one of three equal-width cards), the label column shifts the bar area right of the card's visual centre. To compensate, add right padding to the container equal to label-width + gap (≈ 96px for 88px labels). This nearly perfectly centres the bar track in the card.

Default — bars right-biased
Favourable
18%
Neutral
75%
Unfavourable
7%
Centred — padding-right:96px
Favourable
18%
Neutral
75%
Unfavourable
7%
Gradient Themes
#bdd6f5 → #2f78bd Blue (Primary)
#d2e697 → #99b83f Green (Favourable)
#e7ecf4 → #607199 Blue-grey (Neutral)
#ffe0e4 → #e13b53 Red (Unfavourable)
#d8d0f5 → #6848c6 Purple
#fde8c8 → #e06500 Orange
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.gbcRoot container — flex col, gap 16px, full width
.gbc__rowSingle bar row — flex row, aligned center, gap 8px, position:relative. Hover raises z-index for tooltip layering.
.gbc__labelLeft label — 108px wide, right-aligned, Open Sans 12px #212121, white-space:nowrap prevents wrapping on long labels. Override inline (style="width:88px") for short-label sets (e.g. Favourable / Neutral / Unfavourable) to avoid leaving whitespace that makes bars appear right-biased.
.gbc__trackBar area — flex-1, 23px height, flex row (holds fill + optional outside label)
.gbc__fillGradient bar pill — set width + background inline. Pill shape via border-radius 200px. Min-width 6px ensures visibility at very small percentages.
.gbc__valInside percentage label — 12px semibold white. Place inside .gbc__fill when bar is wide enough (≥ ~15%).
.gbc__val-outsideOutside percentage label — 12px regular #485982. Place as flex sibling after .gbc__fill when bar is too narrow.
.gbc__tooltipHover tooltip — absolute, left 99px (bar start), vertically centered. bg #38476a, 170px wide. Shown by .gbc__row:hover.
.gbc__tooltip-textTooltip body copy — 10px regular white, line-height 12px
Design Tokens
TokenValueUsage
text/primary#212121Row label colour
kpi/neutral600#485982Outside value label colour
neutral/neutral-700#38476aTooltip background
common/white#ffffffInside value label · tooltip text
—91pxLabel column width
—8pxGap between label and bar track
—23pxBar height
—200px radiusBar pill shape
—16pxGap between rows
—12px / 400Label + outside val font-size / weight
—12px / 600Inside val font-size / weight
—10px / 400Tooltip text font-size / weight
borderRadius.sm4pxTooltip border-radius
—170pxTooltip width
—12pxTooltip padding
—#bdd6f5 → #2f78bdBlue gradient (primary)
—#d2e697 → #99b83fGreen gradient (favourable)
—#e7ecf4 → #607199Blue-grey gradient (neutral)
—#ffe0e4 → #e13b53Red gradient (unfavourable)
—#d8d0f5 → #6848c6Purple gradient
—#fde8c8 → #e06500Orange gradient

Donut Chart

A segmented ring chart showing proportional distribution across up to 10 categories, with a centred percentage value and subtitle label. Uses the DS chart colour palette. The 12-o'clock position is segment 1; segments run clockwise with a 3px gap between each.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live Demo · 88% coverage, 10 segments
88 %
top 10 vs total
Segments
Purple · 14%
Blue · 12%
Magenta · 11%
Crimson · 10%
Green · 9%
Teal · 8%
Orange · 8%
Red · 7%
Navy · 5%
Brown · 4%
Others · 12%
Centre label variants
65 %
top 6 vs total
42 %
share of voice
Dimensions
PropertyValue
Container248 × 248px
Ring radius (r)94px (centre of stroke)
Ring stroke-width22px
Outer radius105px · Inner radius 83px
Circumference≈ 590.6px
Gap between segments3px (subtract from segment arc length)
Centre value40px Light (#27365b)
Centre unit (%)20px Light (#27365b), baseline-aligned, pb 5px
Centre subtitle12px Regular #485982, condensed tracking
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.donut-chartRoot — 248×248px, position:relative
.donut-chart__svgFull-size SVG canvas (100%×100%)
.donut-chart__labelAbsolute centre overlay — flex col, items-center
.donut-chart__value-rowFlex row aligning number + unit at baseline
.donut-chart__valueLarge number — 40px, weight 300, #27365b
.donut-chart__unitUnit suffix — 20px, weight 300, baseline-padded
.donut-chart__subtitleDescriptor below value — 12px, #485982
How to calculate SVG segments
r = 94
C = 2 × π × r ≈ 590.6

segLen = (percentage / 100) × C
arcLen = segLen − 3    // 3px gap
offset = −(sum of all previous segLens)

<circle r="94" stroke-dasharray="arcLen 590.6"
         stroke-dashoffset="offset"
         transform="rotate(-90,124,124)"/>

Chart Legend Item

A compact legend row pairing a colour dot with a domain label and percentage value. An optional 14×14px favicon can precede the dot for richer brand identification. Used below or alongside donut and bar charts.

CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.chart-legend-itemRoot — inline-flex, gap 2px, align-items center, py 4px
.chart-legend-item__faviconOptional brand favicon — 14×14px, border-radius 2px
.chart-legend-item__dotColour indicator — 9×9px circle. Set background inline to the chart series colour.
.chart-legend-item__labelText label — 13px Regular #38476a, pb 2px baseline nudge. Format: "domain / value"

Gauge + Timeline

A two-column card template combining a Gauge on the left with a trend line (Single Timeline) on the right. Use to show a KPI score alongside its trend over time.

Gauge

A 270° arc-based radial gauge with a purple progress arc, light lavender track, and a centre overlay showing a sparkle icon, large value, and optional subtitle. Animates from 0 to the target value on load.

Live Demo
0 %
AIO Avg. Freq.
Size Variants
0%
AIO Avg. Freq.
Big Gauge · 248px
0%
AIO Avg. Freq.
Medium Gauge · 200px
0%
Small Gauge · 160px
Value Variants
0%
25%
0%
50%
0%
75%
0%
92%
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.gaugeRoot — 248×248px, position:relative. Add data-value="0–100" for JS to read.
.gauge--smSmall variant — 160×160px, scales typography proportionally.
.gauge__svgFull-size SVG canvas (100%×100%)
.gauge__progressAnimated progress arc — JS sets stroke-dasharray from data-value.
.gauge__labelAbsolute centre overlay — flex col, items-center, gap 6px
.gauge__iconSparkle SVG icon — 36×36px (22×22px on --sm)
.gauge__value-rowFlex row aligning number + unit at baseline
.gauge__valueLarge number — 50px light (300), letter-spacing -2px, #27365b
.gauge__unitUnit suffix (%) — 22px light, baseline-padded
.gauge__subtitleOptional descriptor — 12px #6477a2
Design Tokens
TokenValueUsage
—248 × 248pxDefault gauge size
—160 × 160pxSmall gauge size (--sm)
—270°Arc sweep (gap at bottom)
—r = 94pxTrack & progress arc radius
—18pxTrack & progress stroke-width
—r = 110pxOuter decorative ring radius
—20pxOuter ring stroke-width
purple/200#b3a2e7Progress arc + sparkle icon fill
—#dbd8efTrack arc (background)
—#ededf8Outer decorative ring
—50px / 300Centre value — font-size / weight
—-2pxCentre value letter-spacing
neutral/800#27365bCentre value + unit colour
neutral/400#6477a2Subtitle colour
HTML Usage
<div class="gauge" data-value="68">
  <svg class="gauge__svg" viewBox="0 0 248 248" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
    <!-- Outer decorative ring -->
    <circle cx="124" cy="124" r="110" fill="none" stroke="#fafafa" stroke-width="20"/>
    <!-- Track arc (270°) -->
    <circle cx="124" cy="124" r="94" fill="none" stroke="#dbd8ef" stroke-width="18"
            stroke-dasharray="442.9 147.7" transform="rotate(135,124,124)" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- Progress arc — JS animates stroke-dasharray -->
    <circle class="gauge__progress" cx="124" cy="124" r="94" fill="none" stroke="#b3a2e7"
            stroke-width="18" stroke-dasharray="0 590.6"
            transform="rotate(135,124,124)" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- Inner white fill -->
    <circle cx="124" cy="124" r="79" fill="#ffffff"/>
  </svg>
  <div class="gauge__label">
    <!-- Sparkle icon -->
    <svg class="gauge__icon" viewBox="0 0 36 36" fill="none">
      <path d="M22 5 L23.5 10.5 L29 12 L23.5 13.5 L22 19 L20.5 13.5 L15 12 L20.5 10.5 Z" fill="#b3a2e7"/>
      <path d="M11 15 L12 19 L16 20 L12 21 L11 25 L10 21 L6 20 L10 19 Z" fill="#b3a2e7"/>
      <path d="M26 23 L26.7 25.3 L29 26 L26.7 26.7 L26 29 L25.3 26.7 L23 26 L25.3 25.3 Z" fill="#b3a2e7"/>
    </svg>
    <div class="gauge__value-row">
      <span class="gauge__value">0</span>
      <span class="gauge__unit">%</span>
    </div>
    <span class="gauge__subtitle">AI coverage score</span>
  </div>
</div>

Dotted Timeline Chart

A multi-series percentage line chart across a date range. Each series is a polyline with data-point dots. One series — typically your brand — uses a dashed stroke and a translucent area fill to stand out from competitors. Uses the DS chart colour palette.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live Demo · 6 series · 1 Dec – 31 Dec, 2025
Coordinate system
PropertyValue
viewBox0 0 740 215
Plot area x48 → 710 (width 662)
Plot area y18 (top / 100%) → 188 (bottom / 0%), height 170
Y formulay = 188 − (value% / maxValue%) × 170
X spacingEvenly distribute N points across 48→710
Gridlinesstroke #dce3ef, width 1 — at 0%, 33%, 66%, 100% of range
Axis label font13px condensed rgba(0,0,0,0.6) · Y: top value + 0% only · X: first + last date only · font-size adjusted by JS to compensate SVG scale
X-axis date format'D Mon, YYYY' — e.g. 1 Dec, 2025
Line stroke-width2.5px · stroke-linecap/linejoin: round
Data-point dotr 5.5, fill = series colour, stroke white 2px
Your-brand lineSame as above + stroke-dasharray="6,4"
Your-brand area<polygon> same points + bottom corners, fill-opacity 0.15
Background rectfill #f7f9fd — entire plot area
Series colours (DS chart palette)
02 blue · solid
03 magenta · solid
04 crimson · solid
05 green · solid
07 orange · solid
01 purple · dashed + fill
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.simple-timelineRoot wrapper — display:block, width:100%
.simple-timeline__svgSVG element — width:100%, height:auto (scales proportionally with viewBox — standalone use only)
.chartset-timeline__svgSVG element inside ChartSet — width:100%, height:100%, no viewBox. JS-rendered via renderTimeline() + ResizeObserver. See chartset-donut-lines component.

ChartSet Donut+Lines

A combined chart panel: a Donut Chart showing current share distribution, a Chart Legend Item list labelling each series with a favicon, and a Dotted Timeline Chart filling the remaining width showing how those shares evolved over time. All three share the same 10 series and colour assignments.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live demo · 10 series · Dec 2025 · JS-rendered (resize to verify)

top 10 vs total

booking.com / 12%
tripadvisor.co.uk / 11%
skyscanner.net / 10%
hotels.com / 9%
airbnb.com / 8%
kayak.com / 8%
agoda.com / 7%
lastminute.com / 5%
trivago.com / 4%
others / 12%

Stacked Lines Chart

A 100% stacked area chart showing how multiple series divide a whole over time. Each band represents one series' proportional share; all bands together always fill the full scale. Hover anywhere on the chart to see all series values for that date.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live Demo · 4 series · Jan–Jun 2026 · values sum to 100%
Ads Above AIO
Ads Inside AIO
Ads Below AIO
No Ads
Variant · With comparison lines · vs. Industry Average (dotted)
You
Above
Inside
Below
No Ads
Top 10 Comp.
Above
Inside
Below
Coordinate system
PropertyValue
viewBox0 0 740 215
Plot area x48 → 710 (width 662)
Plot area y18 (top = 100%) → 188 (bottom = 0%), height 170
Y formulay = 188 − (cumulativePct / 100) × 170
X spacingEvenly distribute N dates across 48 → 710
Grid linesHorizontal only — stroke #dce3ef, width 1 — at 0% / 25% / 50% / 75% / 100%
Y labels13px condensed #38476a — 100%, 50%, and 0% only
X labels13px condensed #38476a — first and last date only · format: 'D Mon, YYYY'
Band shape<polygon> — walk forward along lower boundary, then reverse along upper boundary
Band fill-opacity0.9 — slight translucency lets grid lines read through at edges
Boundary lines<polyline> — rgba(255,255,255,0.6), stroke-width 1.5 — separates adjacent bands
Indicator lineVertical dashed line managed by JS on mouse move — rgba(0,0,0,0.35), stroke-dasharray 3,2
Tooltip triggerInvisible <rect> over plot area captures mousemove; tooltip shows all series values for nearest date
Series colours (DS chart palette — indices 01–04)
neutral/50 · bottom band (No Ads)
02 Blue
03 Magenta
04 Crimson · top band

Assign colours in DS index order. With 4 series, the bottom band gets colour 01 and each band above increments. Colour 11 Olive (#c8d09c) or Neutral (#d3dbe6) is used for an "Other / remaining" band when not all contributors are individually tracked. The empty space above all bands reflects the unused portion of the Y scale — it is a deliberate affordance communicating that values are independent, not normalised to 100%.

CSS classes
ClassDescription
.stacked-timelineRoot wrapper — display:block; width:100%; position:relative
.stacked-timeline__svgSVG element — width:100%; height:auto. Uses viewBox for standalone scaling.
.stacked-timeline__legendCentred flex row below the SVG — gap:20px; flex-wrap:wrap
.stacked-timeline__legend-itemInline-flex row — 8px colour dot + label: Open Sans 300, 13px, #38476a
.stacked-timeline__tooltipFixed-position dark tooltip — background rgba(0,0,0,0.82); border-radius:6px; padding:8px 12px; pointer-events:none; z-index:9999

Use a 100% stacked timeline when each series represents a proportional share of a whole — ad placement types, intent categories, or competitor share splits. The chart always fills the full scale, making it easy to track how the composition shifts over time. For comparing absolute values without a meaningful combined total, prefer the Dotted Timeline Chart. Coming soon.

Timeline Chart

A multi-series line chart for comparing absolute values across competitors or categories over time. Each series is a smooth cubic-bezier line rendered via JS. The legend uses the chart-legend-item component — clicking a legend item hides/shows that series. Hover anywhere on the chart to see all values at that date, sorted by value descending.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live Demo · 5 series · 30 data points · legend toggle · hover tooltip
Component Anatomy
ElementClass / RoleNotes
.timeline-chartRoot containerBlock, 100% width
.timeline-chart__svgSVG chart areaviewBox 0 0 740 230 · plot x:36→728, y:18→200
<g> linesJS-rendered series pathsOne <path> per visible series, smooth cubic bezier
tc-indicatorVertical hover lineDashed, shown on mousemove over hit rect
tc-hitInvisible interaction rectCaptures all mouse events over the plot area
.timeline-chart__tooltipFixed floating tooltipposition:fixed, sorted by value descending
.timeline-chart__legendLegend rowUses .chart-legend-item + .csd-series--off for toggle state
Data Format
const SERIES = [
  { label: 'amazon.com',   color: '#b3a2e7', values: [28,26,31,29,...] },
  { label: 'walmart.com',  color: '#64abfb', values: [18,20,17,22,...] },
  // one object per series — values are raw numbers, Y-axis max is configurable
];

// Dates array (one entry per data point, same length as values):
const DATES = ['27 Apr, 2026', '28 Apr, 2026', ... '26 May, 2026'];

// Optional favicon (shown in legend + tooltip):
{ label: 'amazon.com', color: '#b3a2e7', favicon: 'https://...', values: [...] }
Usage notes
  • Y-axis max and label values must be configured to match the data range.
  • Font-size on axis labels is dynamically compensated via JS so they always render at 13px regardless of SVG scale.
  • Line smoothing uses tension=0.35 cubic bezier. Increase for more angular lines.
  • Stroke width: 1px for dense multi-series (10+), 1.8–2px for 5 or fewer series.
  • Legend items use the chart-legend-item component with optional chart-legend-item__favicon.
  • Click a legend item to toggle visibility — applies csd-series--off (opacity 0.35 + strikethrough label).
  • Assign colours in order from the DS chart palette: #b3a2e7 · #64abfb · #d47dd4 · #e86492 · #8ac8b1 ···

Table Chart Template

A ranked table combining a multi-segment stacked bar (position mix) with a proportional context bar (impression volume). Sortable column headers, hover tooltip on the mix bar, and favicon-based competitor identity. Use when you need to compare multiple entities across both a categorical breakdown and a scalar metric in a single scannable view.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live Demo · 10 rows · sortable columns · hover tooltip · position mix + impressions
Competitor
Position mix Above Inside Below
Est. AIO Impressions
Component Anatomy
ClassRoleNotes
.tctRoot containerFull width, uses font-family:var(--font-base)
.tct__headerColumn header rowdisplay:grid, columns mirror row grid
.tct__col-labelColumn label11px semibold uppercase #6477a2. Add --above/--inside/--below for band colours
.tct__col-label--sortableClickable sort headerShows sort icon (↕/↓/↑). Active column gets full opacity icon
.tct__rowData rowSame grid as header. Bottom border except last row
.tct__competitorCompetitor cellFavicon (16×16) + domain label
.tct__mixPosition mix gridgrid-template-columns:1fr 68px 68px 68px;gap:16px
.tct__mix-barStacked bar8px height, pill radius. Hover triggers tooltip
.tct__mix-segmentOne band segmentFill: #8ac8b1 Above · #b3a2e7 Inside · #e86492 Below
.tct__imprImpressions cellgrid-template-columns:1fr 44px;padding-left:20px
.tct__impr-barProportional bar6px height, #64abfb. Width = value/max × 100%
Data Format
const ROWS = [
  { domain: 'amazon.com',    above: 31, inside: 22, below: 18, impr: 2840000 },
  { domain: 'walmart.com',   above: 27, inside: 19, below: 24, impr: 2310000 },
  // …one entry per row
];

// impr: absolute number — displayed as "2.8M" / "940K"
// above/inside/below: raw counts — normalised to % of total per row
// Rows are sorted dynamically by any column; default: impr desc
Usage notes
  • Grid columns: 200px 1fr 180px (competitor · mix · impressions). Adjust as needed.
  • Sort state: track sortCol and sortDir in JS; re-render rows on click.
  • Active sort column: icon at full opacity, values bolded in rows.
  • Position mix tooltip: position:fixed, follows mouse, lists all three bands with colours.
  • Impressions bar scales linearly against the row with the highest value.
  • Favicons fetched from Google S2 API: https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=X&sz=16

Avg. Position

A ranked list showing which position a brand figures in AI Overview citations. Each row pairs a position chip, a favicon, a domain chip, and a change delta. The active row (your brand) uses a filled navy chip. Embed inside a card header for the full pattern.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live Demo
01
aimovig.com
+3
02
vyepti.com
+2
03
ajovy.com
-1
04
emgality.com
+1
05
nurtec.com
-2
Row States
Default row
01
aimovig.com
+3
Active row (your brand)
02
vyepti.com
+2
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.citations-posRoot container — flex column
.citations-pos__bodyRow list — padding 16px 32px 24px, gap 16px between rows
.citations-pos__rowSingle rank row — flex, gap 4px, align center
.citations-pos__pos-chipPosition number chip — 26px height, 16px radius, 10px h-padding
.citations-pos__pos-chip--defaultbg #e7ecf4, text #576993
.citations-pos__pos-chip--activebg #496f97, white text — used for your brand row
.citations-pos__fabs24×24px favicon container
.citations-pos__domain-chipDomain name chip — flex:1, same height/radius as pos-chip
.citations-pos__domain-chip--defaultbg #e7ecf4, text #576993
.citations-pos__domain-chip--activebg #496f97, white text
.citations-pos__deltaChange indicator — 12px, 28px wide, right-aligned
.citations-pos__delta--posPositive change — #60ad5e green
.citations-pos__delta--negNegative change — #de5a5a red

Vertical Bars Chart

SVG-based vertical bar chart for comparing values across categories or time. Supports single-series and multi-series grouped layouts. Bars have rounded top corners, horizontal gridlines, axis labels, and a hover tooltip. Uses the standard chart colour palette.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Single series · Your Brand share of voice · Jan–Jun 2026 · hover a bar
Multi-series grouped · 3 advertisers · Jan–Jun 2026 · hover a bar
Your Brand
booking.com
admiral.com
Design Tokens Used
neutral/200 approx
#dce3ef — gridlines
neutral/700 approx
#38476a — axis labels
neutral/600
#485982 — value labels above bars
chart/01 purple/200
#b3a2e7 — series 01 / single-series default
chart/02 primary.bright
#64abfb — series 02
chart/03 magenta/300
#d47dd4 — series 03
Class Reference
ClassDescription
.vbarRoot container — position:relative; width:100%
.vbar__svgSVG element — width:100%; height:auto (scales with viewBox)
.vbar__barBar path — cursor:pointer, fades to 72% opacity on hover
Coordinate system
PropertyValue
viewBox0 0 740 260
Plot leftx = 52 (leaves 48px for Y labels)
Plot rightx = 720
Plot top (max value)y = 24
Baseline (0)y = 220
Y range196px
X labelsy = 240
Bar corner radiusr = 4 (single) / r = 3 (grouped)
Single bar width72px · 6 bars · 111px slot
Grouped bar width20px · gap 4px · group 68px · centred in 111px slot
Bar top formulay = 220 − (value / maxValue) × 196

Horizontal Bars Chart

SVG-based horizontal bar chart for comparing values across categories — competitors, domains, topics, or segments. Bars grow left-to-right with rounded right corners. Category labels (with optional favicons) on the Y-axis, value + delta badge at the bar end. Supports single-series and multi-series grouped layouts with hover tooltips.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Single series · no value labels · hover tooltip only
Single series · value + delta labels at bar end · hover a bar
CSS Classes
ClassRoleNotes
.hbarRoot containerFull width
.hbar__svgSVG elementwidth:100%, overflow:visible. Plot x: 148→580 (432px), max 40%
.hbar__barSingle barRounded right corners (r=4 single, r=3 grouped). Hover → opacity 0.82
.hbar__bar--groupedBar in a multi-series groupSmaller radius (r=3), height 12px vs 20px single
.hbar__group-hlGroup highlight rectfill-opacity toggled 0→0.6 by JS on group hover
.hbar__group-hitInvisible mouse targetCovers full group row; triggers tooltip
.hbar__tooltipHover tooltipposition:fixed, dark bg, follows mouse
Coordinate guide
viewBox  0 0 640 H   (H varies with row count)
Plot x   148 → 580   (432px, max 40%)
Gridlines at x = 148(0%) · 256(10%) · 364(20%) · 472(30%) · 580(40%)

Single series  bar h=20  row pitch=32   bar right = 148 + value/40 × 432
Multi-series   bar h=12  group pitch=40  3 bars per group at y-offsets +2/+16/+30

Bar path (rounded right, flat left):
  M x0,top H (right−r) A r,r 0 0 1 right,(top+r) V (bot−r) A r,r 0 0 1 (right−r),bot H x0 Z
  where x0=148  r=4(single) or r=3(grouped)

Multi-Series Horizontal Bars Chart

A grouped horizontal bar chart for comparing multiple series across categories. Bars within each group use 4px inner gaps; groups are separated by 8px. Hovering a group highlights it and shows a multi-series tooltip. Uses the same .hbar container and chart colour palette as the single-series variant.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
3 advertisers · 5 categories · 8px bars · hover a group
Your Brand
booking.com
comparethemarket.com

Vertical Stacked Bars Chart

100 % stacked vertical bars showing share composition across time. Each bar is divided into labelled segments that together always reach 100 %. Hovering any segment highlights the full column and shows a grouped tooltip with all series values. Reuses the .vbar container and the chart colour palette.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
100 % stacked · Share composition · Jan–Jun 2026 · hover a column
Your Brand
booking.com
admiral.com
Others
Design Tokens Used
neutral/200 approx
#dce3ef — gridlines
chart/01 purple/200
#b3a2e7 — Your Brand (top segment)
chart/02 primary.bright
#64abfb — booking.com
chart/03 magenta/300
#d47dd4 — admiral.com
chart/neutral
#d3dbe6 — Others (bottom segment)
states.selectedSoft
#eaf4ff — column hover highlight
Class Reference
Class / ElementDescription
.vbarRoot container — shared with Vertical Bars Chart
.vbar__svg.vbar__svg--stackedSVG modifier — used by JS to scope stacked-chart group hover separately
.svbar__group-hlPer-column highlight rect — fill-opacity toggled 0→1 on hover
.svbar__group-zoneTransparent overlay rect — drawn last to capture all pointer events for the column
<path> top segmentRounded top corners only (r=4) — same path pattern as Vertical Bars Chart
<path> bottom segmentRounded bottom corners only (r=4) — mirrors top-segment pattern
<rect> middle segmentsPlain rects — no rounding on interior boundaries
Coordinate system
PropertyValue
viewBox0 0 740 252
Plot left / rightx = 52 / x = 720
Plot top (100%) / baseline (0%)y = 24 / y = 220
Y range196 px · 1 % = 1.96 px
Gridlinesy = 24 (100%), 73 (75%), 122 (50%), 171 (25%), 220 (0%)
Bar width72 px · slot 111 px · 6 bars
Segment top formulay = 220 − cumulative_pct × 1.96
Segment height formulah = value_pct × 1.96
Corner radiusr = 4 — top of top segment, bottom of bottom segment only

Insight Banner

A contextual information strip used to surface AI-generated or data-driven insights within a page or card. Combines a circular icon badge with an overline label and body copy on a soft blue background.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Variants
Default — single sentence
INSIGHTS

Your Recommended share trails the peer average by 11 pts.

Long copy — wraps to multiple lines
INSIGHTS

Your Recommended share trails the peer average by 11 pts. The biggest swing factor is competitor-favoured comparisons against Bupa lorem ipsum dolorum ectum fictum larounm etcum ets fiition moneum senum.

Custom label
AI SUMMARY

Competitor spend has increased 23% month-over-month, driven primarily by brand-term bidding on your top 5 keywords.

Interactive Demo
INSIGHTS

Your Recommended share trails the peer average by 11 pts.

Design Tokens Used
core/secondary/card-light-blue
#f7faff — banner background
blue/100
#b1d1f6 — icon container fill
grey/650 (text/secondary)
#6b6b6b — label + body text
borderRadius.xl
12px — container radius
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.insight-bannerRoot container — flex row, gap 16px, padding 16px, #f7faff bg, radius 12px, full width
.insight-banner__icon-wrapCircular icon badge — 28×28px, #b1d1f6 fill, border-radius 2000px
.insight-banner__textText column — flex col, flex-1, word-break: break-word
.insight-banner__labelOverline — 10px, 600 weight, #6b6b6b, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.5px
.insight-banner__bodyBody copy — 13px, 400 weight, #6b6b6b, line-height 15px, margin 0
Anatomy & Dimensions
PartValue
Container padding16px all sides
Container gap (icon ↔ text)16px
Container border-radius12px (--radius-xl)
Icon container size28 × 28px
Icon container radius2000px (full circle)
Icon size20 × 20px (Alert-Outline, inset 10% all sides)
Label fontOpen Sans 10px / 600 / uppercase / #6b6b6b
Body fontOpen Sans 13px / 400 / #6b6b6b / line-height 15px
Figma node77:1927 (Claude-DS)

Action Banner

A contextual prompt strip that surfaces recommended actions alongside a lead sentence and a structured bullet list. Uses a warm olive palette to visually distinguish it from informational banners.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Variants
Default — lead sentence + bullet list
ACTIONS

Scale what is working without letting credibility erode.

  • Audit which prompt clusters are driving the Visibility Score lift
  • Replicate structural patterns from link-generating content
  • Prioritise authority reinforcement in declining citation segments
Single action — lead sentence only, no list
ACTIONS

Review your top-converting search terms and expand match types to capture adjacent demand.

Custom label
RECOMMENDATIONS

Your budget allocation is uneven across campaigns.

  • Shift 15% of spend from Brand Exact to Competitor Broad
  • Pause low-CTR ad groups with fewer than 50 impressions
Interactive Demo
ACTIONS

Scale what is working without letting credibility erode.

  • Audit which prompt clusters are driving the Visibility Score lift
  • Replicate structural patterns from link-generating content
  • Prioritise authority reinforcement in declining citation segments

—
#f7f8f2 — banner background
olive
#c8d09c — icon container fill
grey/650
#6b6b6b — label + body text
borderRadius.xl
12px — container radius

ClassDescription
.action-bannerRoot container — flex row, gap 16px, padding 16px, #f7f8f2 bg, radius 12px, full width
.action-banner__icon-wrapCircular icon badge — 28×28px, #c8d09c fill, border-radius 2000px
.action-banner__textText column — flex col, flex-1
.action-banner__labelOverline — 10px, 600 weight, #6b6b6b, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.5px
.action-banner__bodyBody wrapper — 13px, 400 weight, #6b6b6b, line-height 15px

.action-banner__body ul / liBullet list — disc style, padding-left 20px, line-height 15px

CSS Classes
ClassPurpose
.ds-chipBase — inline-flex pill, 26px height, 16px border-radius
.ds-chip__icon16×16px icon slot (left check or right cancel)
.ds-chip__labelText label with 4px horizontal padding
.ds-chip--outlinedStyle: transparent bg, 1px border, coloured text
.ds-chip--lightStyle: light tint bg, coloured text, no border
.ds-chip--darkStyle: saturated bg, white text, no border
.ds-chip--grey / --purple / --blue … --neutralColour modifier (14 options)

AIO Mentions Sample

A bespoke table component that surfaces every sentence where an AIO names a tracked brand, together with the framing and sentiment of that mention. Combines the Card Header and SubTabs DS components with a custom table header and sample rows.

ClassPurpose
.mentions-sampleRoot container — white, rounded-12px, flex-col
.mentions-sample__bodySection below the card header (table header + rows)
.mentions-sample__table-headerBlue (#f7faff) column-header row, 60px height
.mentions-sample__thSingle column header cell — semibold 14px, #496f97
.mentions-sample__th--mainModifier: makes Search Term column flex:1
.mentions-sample__sort-icon24×24px chevron icon wrapper in header cells
.mentions-sample__rowsVertical stack of sample rows (gap:8px)
.mentions-sample__rowOuter row wrapper — #f9f9f9, rounded-12px, p-16px
.mentions-sample__contentFlex row holding label + chip cells

.mentions-sample__brandBrand logo + name inline row

.mentions-sample__search-termSearch term label — 13px, #485982
.mentions-sample__quoteAIO quote text — 14px, black
.mentions-sample__quote-brandBold + underline brand name within the quote
.mentions-sample__cellFixed-width chip column (Type / Framing / Sentiment)

.ds-chip.ds-chip--light.ds-chip--tealFraming chip — uses DS Chip (Miscellaneous)

.mentions-sample__tabIndividual tab pill — 24px, 12px semibold
.mentions-sample__tab--activeActive state — #7387a9 bg, white text
.mentions-sample__tab-badgeCount badge inside a tab

Checkbox

A selection control that allows users to toggle between checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states. Supports six distinct visual states for full interactive coverage.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
States
Default
Hovered
Set
Partial
Disabled
Disabled Set
Interactive Demo
Usage in a List
Select framing types
Design Tokens
Token Value Usage
Size15 × 15pxInner box dimensions
Hit area16 × 16pxOuter clickable area
Border radius4pxAll states
Border — default#496f97neutral
Border — hover#0c8deacore/primary/main
Fill — checked#0c8deaprimary.main — Set & Partial
Fill — disabled set#a8c5dbmuted blue
Border — disabled#d2d2d2grey/light grey
Checkmark / dash#ffffffAlways white
CSS Classes
Class Description
.ds-checkboxBase wrapper — 16×16px hit area
.ds-checkbox__innerVisible 15×15px box — holds border/fill and pseudo-element
.ds-checkbox--hoveredForces hover appearance (for static demos)
.ds-checkbox--setChecked state — blue fill + white checkmark
.ds-checkbox--partialIndeterminate — blue fill + white dash
.ds-checkbox--disabledDisabled unchecked — light grey border, no pointer
.ds-checkbox--disabled-setDisabled checked — muted blue fill + white checkmark
.ds-checkbox-inputNative <input> styled to match DS — use for real interactivity
.ds-checkbox-labelFlex label wrapping .ds-checkbox-input + text

Radio Button

A single-choice selection control. Users pick one option from a set — selecting a new option deselects the previous one. Supports five visual states: Default, Hovered, Set (selected), Disabled, and Disabled Set. Built from Figma node 88:1250 via the Figma MCP workflow.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
All States
Default
Hovered
Set
Disabled
Disabled Set
Interactive Demo
NORMAL
DISABLED
Design Tokens
TOKEN VALUE USAGE
core/primary/main #0c8dea Set state fill + Hovered border
neutral/600 #496f97 Default border
core/states/disabled #bacfe2 Disabled border + Disabled Set fill
white/white #ffffff Inner dot (Set states)
— 16 × 16 px Outer circle size
— 10 × 10 px Inner dot size (Set state)
— 1.5 px Border width
Props Reference
PROP / CLASS VALUES DESCRIPTION
.radio__outer--default—Unselected, interactive state
.radio__outer--hovered—Cursor hover — blue border, pointer cursor
.radio__outer--set+ .radio__innerSelected — blue fill with white dot
.radio__outer--disabled—Not interactive, unselected
.radio__outer--disabled-set+ .radio__innerNot interactive, locked in selected state

Toggle

A binary on/off control. Gives users immediate feedback of a state change — no form submission required. Supports eight visual states across two values (On / Off) and four interaction states (Default, Hovered, Pressed, Disabled). Built from Figma node 167:1041 via the Figma MCP workflow.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
All States
DEFAULT
HOVERED
PRESSED
DISABLED
Off
On
Variant — With Label
OFF
Gap Analysis
ON
Gap Analysis
DISABLED
Gap Analysis 
<!-- Off with label -->
<div class="ds-toggle-row">
  <div class="ds-toggle"><div class="ds-toggle__thumb"></div></div>
  <span class="ds-toggle-row__label">Gap Analysis</span>
</div>

<!-- On with label -->
<div class="ds-toggle-row">
  <div class="ds-toggle ds-toggle--on"><div class="ds-toggle__thumb"></div></div>
  <span class="ds-toggle-row__label">Gap Analysis</span>
</div>
Interactive Demo
Design Tokens
Token Value Usage
Track size35 × 20pxPill width × height — all states
Track radius200pxFull pill
Thumb size16 × 16pxWhite circle offset 2px from edge
primary.main — On#0c8deaTrack — On Default
Brand/Mid blue — On hover#007DB8Track — On Hovered
Brand/Navy — On pressed#093C6BTrack — On Pressed
Off track — default#7A8FABTrack — Off Default
Off track — hover / pressed#6B7FA0Track — Off Hovered & Pressed
Disabled — off#C8D3E0Track — Off Disabled
Disabled — on#70AECETrack — On Disabled
Background/White — thumb#FFFFFFThumb — all states
Thumb shadow0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.25)Enabled states only
CSS Classes
Class Description
.ds-toggleBase pill track — 35×20px, Off Default state
.ds-toggle__thumbWhite circle inside the track — position driven by modifier classes
.ds-toggle--onOn state — blue track (#0c8dea / primary.main), thumb slides right
.ds-toggle--hoveredHover appearance override — use in static state demos
.ds-toggle--pressedPressed / active appearance override
.ds-toggle--disabledMuted track, no pointer, thumb shadowless
.ds-toggle-inputNative <input type="checkbox"> styled to match — use for real interactivity
.ds-toggle-labelFlex label wrapping .ds-toggle-input + text
.ds-toggle-label--disabledMuted label text for disabled rows
.ds-toggle-rowFlex wrapper for static toggle + label — gap 8px, aligned center
.ds-toggle-row__labelLabel text — 14px regular, neutral/700 (#38476a)
Anatomy
Track
35 × 20px Thumb
16 × 16px, offset 2px
Thumb sits 2px from the near edge when Off, and 17px from the left when On.
Track and thumb both transition at 0.18s ease.

Dropdown

A plain-button trigger that reveals a floating list of selectable options. Supports a flat list, divider-separated items, and fully grouped sections with labels.
