CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.ds-dropdownRoot wrapper — relative, inline-flex. Positions the menu against the trigger.
.ds-dropdown__triggerPlain button — 36px height, 1.5px border #c4cdd5, radius 6px, 14px regular #27365b. Add chevron SVG inside.
.ds-dropdown__trigger--openActive state — blue border #1565c0, blue text, light blue bg. Chevron rotates 180°.
.ds-dropdown__trigger-chevronSVG chevron — inherits colour, rotates on open via parent modifier.
.ds-dropdown__menuFloating panel — white bg, radius 12px, soft shadow, 6px vertical padding. Hidden by default (opacity 0, translateY -4px).
.ds-dropdown__menu--openVisible state — opacity 1, translateY 0.
.ds-dropdown__itemRow item — 36px height, 0 12px padding, 14px regular #27365b. Hover: #f0f4f8 bg.
.ds-dropdown__item--selectedCurrently selected item — semibold #1565c0 text, blue dot indicator on right.
.ds-dropdown__item--disabledNon-interactive item — muted #a0aab6, no pointer.
.ds-dropdown__divider1px separator — #f0f4f8, 4px vertical margin.
.ds-dropdown__group-labelSection heading — 11px semibold #6477a2 uppercase. Not interactive.
Design Tokens
TokenValueUsage
—36pxTrigger & item height
borderRadius.sm6pxTrigger border-radius
borderRadius.xl12pxMenu border-radius
—1.5px solid #c4cdd5Trigger default border
fill.main#1565c0Trigger open border · selected text
—0 4px 20px rgba(27,48,96,.10)Menu shadow (primary layer)
—0 1px 4px rgba(27,48,96,.06)Menu shadow (ambient layer)
neutral/800#27365bItem text colour
—#f0f4f8Item hover bg · divider colour
neutral/400#6477a2Group label colour
—14px / 400Item font-size / weight
—11px / 600Group label font-size / weight
—6px 0Menu vertical padding
—0 12pxItem horizontal padding
—4pxDivider vertical margin
HTML Usage
<!-- Flat list -->
<div class="ds-dropdown">
  <button class="ds-dropdown__trigger" onclick="dsDropdownToggle('my-dd')">
    Label <svg class="ds-dropdown__trigger-chevron">…</svg>
  </button>
  <div class="ds-dropdown__menu" id="my-dd-menu">
    <div class="ds-dropdown__item ds-dropdown__item--selected">Option A</div>
    <div class="ds-dropdown__item">Option B</div>
    <div class="ds-dropdown__item ds-dropdown__item--disabled">Option C</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- With dividers -->
<div class="ds-dropdown__menu">
  <div class="ds-dropdown__item">Today</div>
  <div class="ds-dropdown__divider"></div>
  <div class="ds-dropdown__item">Last 7 Days</div>
</div>

<!-- Grouped with labels -->
<div class="ds-dropdown__menu">
  <span class="ds-dropdown__group-label">Desktop</span>
  <div class="ds-dropdown__item">Windows</div>
  <div class="ds-dropdown__item">Mac</div>
  <div class="ds-dropdown__divider"></div>
  <span class="ds-dropdown__group-label">Mobile</span>
  <div class="ds-dropdown__item">iOS</div>
  <div class="ds-dropdown__item">Android</div>
</div>

Basic Dropdown

An executional dropdown — the trigger button never changes its label and no item is marked as selected. Use when the action is one-shot (e.g. download format, export type) rather than a persistent choice.

Live Demo
Icon
PNG
JPEG
SVG
PDF
Outlined
Export as CSV
Export as XLSX
Export as PDF
Plain
Duplicate
Share link
Delete
Anatomy
Icon
PNG
JPEG
SVG
PDF
Outlined
Export as CSV
Export as XLSX
Export as PDF
Plain
Duplicate
Share link
Delete
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.ds-dropdownRoot wrapper — same as the standard Dropdown component.
.btn + .btn--plain / .btn--outlined / .btn--icon-onlyTrigger button — any button variant. Label never changes on item pick.
.ds-dropdown__trigger--openApplied while the menu is open. Removed on close or item pick.
.ds-dropdown__menuFloating panel — same styles as standard Dropdown.
.ds-dropdown__itemRow item — no --selected modifier used in this pattern.
.ds-dropdown__dividerOptional 1px separator between item groups.
Design Tokens

Shares all tokens with the standard Dropdown — trigger, menu, item, and divider values are identical. See the Dropdown component for the full token table.

HTML Usage
<!-- Icon trigger (executional — label never changes) -->
<div class="ds-dropdown" id="my-dd">
  <button class="btn btn--plain btn--icon-only" id="my-dd-btn"
          onclick="dsDropdownToggle('my-dd')" aria-label="Download">
    <svg …>…</svg>
  </button>
  <div class="ds-dropdown__menu" id="my-dd-menu">
    <div class="ds-dropdown__item" onclick="dsDropdownToggle('my-dd')">PNG</div>
    <div class="ds-dropdown__item" onclick="dsDropdownToggle('my-dd')">JPEG</div>
    <div class="ds-dropdown__item" onclick="dsDropdownToggle('my-dd')">SVG</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Text trigger — same pattern, any btn variant -->
<div class="ds-dropdown" id="my-dd2">
  <button class="btn btn--outlined" id="my-dd2-btn" onclick="dsDropdownToggle('my-dd2')">
    Export
    <svg class="ds-dropdown__trigger-chevron" …>…</svg>
  </button>
  <div class="ds-dropdown__menu" id="my-dd2-menu">
    <div class="ds-dropdown__item" onclick="dsDropdownToggle('my-dd2')">Export as CSV</div>
    <div class="ds-dropdown__item" onclick="dsDropdownToggle('my-dd2')">Export as PDF</div>
  </div>
</div>

Filter Advanced Dropdown

A searchable, multi-select panel with include/exclude toggle and apply action. Used for filtering by campaign, topic, or any long list of options.

Live Demo
Anatomy
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.ds-adv-ddWrapper — relative positioned container
.ds-adv-dd__panelFloating panel — white, 320px, 12px radius, shadow
.ds-adv-dd__searchSearch row — icon + text input, auto blue border on focus
.ds-adv-dd__toolbarRow containing toggle group and Select All
.ds-adv-dd__toggle-btn--activeActive state on Include / Exclude toggle button
.ds-adv-dd__itemList row — checkbox + label + optional badge
.ds-adv-dd__badgeCircular badge (e.g. "1H") — blue outlined circle
.ds-adv-dd__footerBottom row — right-aligned Apply button

Input Field

A single-line text input for collecting user-typed data. Covers the full interaction lifecycle — from empty through focused, filled, error, and disabled — plus label, helper text, and icon slot variants.

States
Default
Focused
Filled
Error
Disabled
Read-only
Variants
With Label
With Helper Text
Enter the root domain without https://
With Error
Please enter a valid email address
With Prefix Icon
With Action Button
Interactive Demo
Click the field and start typing
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.ds-inputRoot wrapper — flex column, gap 4px. Holds label + wrap + helper.
.ds-input__labelField label — 12px semibold #485982, above the wrap
.ds-input__wrapInput container — 40px height, 1px border #c4cdd5, radius 6px, white bg. Gains focus ring on :focus-within.
.ds-input__inputNative <input> — 14px regular #27365b, placeholder #8fa0b8, no border/outline, transparent bg
.ds-input__prefixLeft icon slot — 10px left padding, icon colour #6477a2
.ds-input__suffixRight icon slot — 10px right padding, icon colour #6477a2
.ds-input__actionRight icon button — 32×32px, hover bg #eaf1f7, no border
.ds-input__helperHelper text — 12px regular #6477a2, below wrap
.ds-input__error-msgError message — 12px regular #de5a5a, replaces helper on error
.ds-input__wrap--focusedBlue border #1565c0 + focus ring — use in static demos
.ds-input__wrap--filledBorder #a0aec0 — indicates a value has been entered
.ds-input__wrap--errorRed border #de5a5a + red focus ring
.ds-input__wrap--disabledBg #f5f7fa, border #dde1e9, text muted, no pointer
.ds-input__wrap--readonlyBg #f9fafb, border #dde1e9, default cursor
Design Tokens
TokenValueUsage
—40pxInput height
borderRadius.sm6pxWrap border-radius
—1px solid #c4cdd5Default border
fill.main#1565c0Focused border colour
—rgba(21,101,192,0.12)Focus ring (box-shadow)
red/400#de5a5aError border & message colour
—rgba(222,90,90,0.1)Error focus ring
neutral/800#27365bInput text colour
—#8fa0b8Placeholder colour
neutral/600#485982Label colour
neutral/400#6477a2Helper text · icon colour
—14px / 400Input text size / weight
—12px / 600Label size / weight
—12px / 400Helper / error text size / weight
—#f5f7faDisabled background
—#f9fafbRead-only background
HTML Usage
<!-- Basic input -->
<div class="ds-input">
  <label class="ds-input__label">Field label</label>
  <div class="ds-input__wrap">
    <input class="ds-input__input" type="text" placeholder="Placeholder">
  </div>
  <span class="ds-input__helper">Helper text</span>
</div>

<!-- Error state -->
<div class="ds-input">
  <label class="ds-input__label">Field label</label>
  <div class="ds-input__wrap ds-input__wrap--error">
    <input class="ds-input__input" type="text" value="Invalid value">
  </div>
  <span class="ds-input__error-msg">Error message</span>
</div>

<!-- With prefix icon -->
<div class="ds-input">
  <div class="ds-input__wrap">
    <span class="ds-input__prefix"><!-- svg icon --></span>
    <input class="ds-input__input" type="text" placeholder="Search…">
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Disabled -->
<div class="ds-input">
  <div class="ds-input__wrap ds-input__wrap--disabled">
    <input class="ds-input__input" type="text" placeholder="Disabled" disabled>
  </div>
</div>

Component Development Workflow with Figma MCP

A structured end-to-end workflow for building design-system components from Figma into the styleguide using the Figma MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration. The Radio Button component (node 88:1250) is used as the worked example throughout.

1
Initial Setup & Analysis
Initialise the Figma MCP connection and extract the target component.
→Connect to Figma via MCP and verify access to the design file
→Extract node ID from Figma URL: node-id=88-1250
→Fetch component data: name, variants, properties, assets
2
Extract Component Data
Parse the Figma response to gather all visual and structural data.
ComponentRadio Button
Node ID88:1250
Size16 × 16 px
Variants5 states
StatesDefault · Hovered · Set · Disabled · Disabled Set
3
Generate Component Specifications
Document visual and behavioural specifications.
VISUAL SPECS
Size: 16 × 16 px outer · 10 × 10 px inner dot
Border: 1.5 px solid
Radius: 8 px (fully round)
Transition: border-color + background 150ms
COLOUR TOKENS
primary/main #0c8dea
neutral/600 #496f97
disabled #bacfe2
white/white #ffffff
BEHAVIOURAL SPECS
Hover: border switches to primary blue
Click: fill becomes primary blue, inner dot appears
Keyboard: Space to select, arrow keys to move focus
ARIA: role="radio", aria-checked, aria-disabled
RESPONSIVE BEHAVIOUR
Fixed 16 × 16 px — does not scale
Touch target: 44 × 44 px minimum wrapper recommended
Group layout: vertical stack by default, can be horizontal
4
Implementation Phase
Build the component in HTML/CSS matching the Figma design exactly.
<!-- Radio Button: Default -->
<div class="radio">
  <div class="radio__outer radio__outer--default"></div>
</div>

<!-- Radio Button: Set (selected) -->
<div class="radio">
  <div class="radio__outer radio__outer--set">
    <div class="radio__inner"></div>
  </div>
</div>
5
Create Preview Showcases
All variants, themes, states and interactive demos — see Radio Button section for the full preview.
All 5 states displayed
Interactive group demo
Design tokens table
Props reference
6
Component-Specific Features
Unique behaviours and patterns specific to this component type.
→Always used inside a group — only one option can be selected at a time
→Hover state applies only to the outer circle, not the label row
→Use .radio-group + .radio-row helpers for labelled groups
→Disabled state uses cursor:not-allowed on the row — never on the circle alone
✓
Documentation & Output
Component spec file, GitHub package and styleguide entry all generated.
View component on GitHub View Radio Button component →

Main Nav

The primary application sidebar navigation. Groups product sections by domain (Agents, Reports, Actions, Insights, Brand Protection) with a branded header, account switcher, and scrollable item list.

Placement: 24px from the left edge, 24px below the App Bar, inside the transparent sidebar container (254px wide, 16px margins each side). Nav card is 222px wide.

View on GitHub Preview Demo
Live Demo
AGENTS
Chat Interface
Arlo Insights
REPORTS
AI Overview
AI Ads Intelligence
GEO Performance
AI Ads Landscape
GEO Landscape
Industry Landscape
Account Report
Competitor Ads
ACTIONS
INSIGHTS
Monitor Dashboard
Alerts
Configuration
BRAND PROTECTION
Vessy Dragusheva
Domain
Location
States
Default
Hovered
Active
With Arrow
Header Block
Adthena London
Full Nav
Adthena London
REPORTS
Vessy Dragusheva
CSS Classes
ClassDescription
.mnv2Root element — 222px wide, flex column, bg #fcfdff, border-radius 8px
.mnv2__topFlex:1 column — grows to fill nav height, holds mnv2__head + mnv2__scroll; min-height:0 enables overflow scrolling in the scroll child
.mnv2__headHeader area — flex column, stacks logo bar and account row, flex-shrink:0
.mnv2__logo-barTop bar — bg #334557, padding 8px 12px, border-radius 8px 8px 0 0, logo + bell
.mnv2__bell-btnBell icon button — reset styles, cursor pointer
.mnv2__accountAccount row — bg rgba(234,241,247,0.8), padding 6px 8px, flex row with location icon, text, arrow
.mnv2__account-textAccount text stack — flex column, flex:1
.mnv2__account-primaryPrimary account label — 12px semibold #27365b
.mnv2__account-secondarySecondary account label — 12px regular #27365b
.mnv2__account-arrowRotate arrow icon for account row
.mnv2__scrollScrollable nav body — overflow-y auto, padding 4px
.mnv2__section-labelSection group label — 8px semibold uppercase letter-spacing 0.6px, color #485982, padding 6px 8px 2px
.mnv2__itemNav item button — flex row, height 32px, padding 4px 8px, border-radius 4px, gap 8px, no border
.mnv2__item:hoverHover state — bg rgba(0,0,0,0.04)
.mnv2__item--activeActive item — bg #eaf4ff
.mnv2__item--active .mnv2__item-labelActive label color — #3079bd
.mnv2__item-labelItem label — Open Sans 12px 600, color #2b2b2b, flex:1
.mnv2__item-arrowExpandable indicator — rotates 180deg when open (.mnv2__item--open)
.mnv2__sepSection separator — 1px solid #e0e8f0, margin 4px 8px
.mnv2__bottomFooter area — border-top 1px #c0cde0, padding 8px, bg #fcfdff, border-radius 0 0 8px 8px
.mnv2__user-rowUser profile row — flex, height 32px, padding 4px 8px, gap 8px
.mnv2__user-nameUser name label — 12px semibold #27365b
HTML Usage
<nav class="mnv2">

  <!-- Top section (flex:1, holds header + scrollable body) -->
  <div class="mnv2__top">

    <!-- Header -->
    <div class="mnv2__head">
      <div class="mnv2__logo-bar">
        <div class="mnv2__logo"><img src="adthena-logo.svg" width="78" height="18" alt="Adthena"></div>
        <button class="mnv2__bell-btn"><img src="bell.svg" width="14" height="14" alt=""></button>
      </div>
      <div class="mnv2__account">
        <img src="location.svg" width="20" height="20" alt="">
        <div class="mnv2__account-text">
          <span class="mnv2__account-primary">Adthena</span>
          <span class="mnv2__account-secondary">London</span>
        </div>
        <img class="mnv2__account-arrow" src="angle-down.svg" width="12" height="12" alt="">
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Scrollable nav body -->
    <div class="mnv2__scroll">
    <div class="mnv2__section-label">AGENTS</div>
    <button class="mnv2__item" data-nav="arlo">
      <img src="arlo.svg" width="18" height="18" alt="">
      <span class="mnv2__item-label">Ask Arlo</span>
      <img class="mnv2__item-arrow" src="angle-down.svg" width="12" height="12" alt="">
    </button>
    <div class="mnv2__sep"></div>

    <div class="mnv2__section-label">REPORTS</div>
    <button class="mnv2__item mnv2__item--active" data-nav="ai-search">
      <img src="ai-search.svg" width="18" height="18" alt="">
      <span class="mnv2__item-label">AI Search</span>
      <img class="mnv2__item-arrow" src="angle-down.svg" width="12" height="12" alt="">
    </button>
      <div class="mnv2__sep"></div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /mnv2__top -->

  <!-- Footer (pinned to bottom) -->
  <div class="mnv2__bottom">
    <button class="mnv2__item" data-nav="settings">
      <img src="settings.svg" width="18" height="18" alt="">
      <span class="mnv2__item-label">Settings</span>
    </button>
    <div class="mnv2__user-row">
      <img src="user.svg" width="18" height="18" alt="">
      <span class="mnv2__user-name">Vessy Dragusheva</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</nav>
